nasb.text: So he took him to the field of Zophim, to the top of Pisgah, and built seven altars and offered a bull and a ram on each altar.

esv.text: And he took him to the field of Zophim, to the top of Pisgah, and built seven altars and offered a bull and a ram on each altar.

cnv.text: 於是巴勒帶巴蘭到了瑣腓田，上了毘斯迦山頂，築了七座祭壇，在每座祭壇上獻了一頭公牛和一隻公綿羊。

ccb.text: 他领巴兰上到毗斯迦山顶的琐腓田，在那里筑了七座祭坛，每座坛上都献了一头公牛和一只公绵羊。
